title: Brazilian-Style Fried Potato Cakes
description: A crispy and delicious Brazilian-inspired dish made with shredded potatoes, onions, and spices. Serve as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add broken bun pieces and fry until crispy, stirring constantly.
Remove fried bun pieces from oil and place on paper towels.
Add grated potato and chopped onion to the same frying pan.
Fry until the potatoes start to brown, stirring occasionally.
Add fried bun pieces back to the pan and stir well.
Continue frying for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Season with salt and citrusy lime juice to taste.
